title: convolvulus hastatus var. major
intro: Convolvulus hastatus var. major, also known as the blue bugloss, is a plant species that belongs to the Convolvulaceae family. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant is rich in bioactive compounds, which provide several health benefits, including antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating digestive issues, skin conditions, and respiratory problems. Convolvulus hastatus var. major can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its extracts are also used in modern herbal medicine.
